last_task.subject: Resolve fleet escalation: forge blocked on task #188 — Escalate to whoabuddy: need GitHub PAT created for forge0btc (repo scope). Steps after PAT creation: 1) On Forge (192.168.1.15): arc creds set --service github --key token --value <PAT>, 2) echo <PAT> | gh auth login --with-token, 3) Retry pushing fix/erc8004-transfer-post-condition branch and opening PR on aibtcdev/skills.
